case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. DEMARCO A GARCIA

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, DEMARCO A $4,119.49 PRINCIPAL, $292.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,411.49, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100154288)
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 100220417) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, DEMARCO A
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, DEMARCO A

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200033857) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, DEMARCO A NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-04-2022
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200036819), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SERVED AUG-16-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, DEMARCO A
